title: craft-ai-agents/craft-agents-oss
abstract: Craft Agents is an open-source AI agent desktop app that enables intuitive multitasking, connects to any API or service via MCP, shares sessions, and provides a document-centric workflow in a beautiful UI.
abstract_zh: 开源AI Agent桌面应用！支持多会话管理、通过MCP连接任意API/服务、会话共享、以文档为中心的工作流。界面精美，热加载技能和源，是Claude Code的最佳GUI伴侣。
